name: vault-init-fix — Remove project name from init flow, workspace-only scaffold
objective: Init should create only a workspace. Project name in the init form is premature — user may have no projects yet. Remove project name from scaffold, CLI, API, and Settings UI. Projects are created later via the UI.
exit_criteria: scaffoldVault() accepts only workspaceName — no projectName, no boardName.
Generated vault/shared/ contains only: workspaces/{id}.md and empty subdirs for projects, boards, columns, tasks, agents, approvals, audit, threads.
CLI init accepts --workspace-name only; --project-name flag is removed.
POST /api/vault/init body accepts only { vaultRoot, workspaceName }.
Settings UI init form shows only the Workspace name field.
All tests pass after the change.
